verses.text: Jesuh in Galilee Tuili gei-ah thuhilh ding kipankik leuleu hi. Ama kiimah a kikhawm mite tamlua ahih manin gunkuang sungah pai-in a tu hi. A gunkuang pen tui tungah om a, mihonpite ahih leh tuigei leilakah om uh hi
Amah in thugentehna tawh thu tampi hilh a, a thuhilhna-ah
“Ngai un! Khaici vawhpa, khaici vawh dingin a kuankhia hi
Khaici a vawh ciangin pawlkhatte lamdung tu a, vasate hong leengin tawmin a ne uh hi
Pawlkhatte leihoih a sahlohna mun, suang a kitawphah tung tu a, lei sahlo ahih manin thakhatin popah hi
Tua ankungnote in zung thuk kha zolo ahih manin nisa in a kat ciangin a keutumpah uh hi
Pawlkhatte lingbulsum omna lak tu a, lingte hong selin depgawp ahih manin bangmah gahzolo hi
Adangte ahih leh leihoihna mun tu ahih manin hong po-in khang a, a zah sawmthum, a zah sawmguk, a zah za khat dongin an hong piang hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Zakna ding bil a neite in hih thu za ta un,” ci-in a thugen a khum hi.
Mihonpite a ven', amah guak a om ciangin nungzui sawmlenihte leh ama thugen a za mite in, na thugentehna a khiatna hong gen in, ci-in a ngen uh hi
Jesuh in, “Pasian' Ukna tawh kisai thusim, Pasian in note tungah hong gen khinzo hi. Ahi zongin a pualama om mite tungah na khempeuh, thugentehna bek tawh kigen hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh, ‘En en napi-un a muh nailohna ding, za za napi-un a tel nailohna ding; amaute in mu-in tel le uh Pasian' lamah kihei ding uh a, Pasian in amaute' mawhna maisak ding hi,’” ci-in a dawng hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in Khaici Vawhpa Thugentehna Telgen

verses.text: Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Note in hih thugentehna theilo na hi uh hiam? Theilo na hih uh leh, thugentehna khat peuhpeuh bangci theih ngei ding na hi uh hiam
Khaici vawhpa in khaici vawh bangin Pasian' thu a vawh hi
Khatveivei lamdung a tu khaici bang a, mite in a thu za napi-in, a zakkhit phetun Satan hong pai-in amaute sunga a kivawh thute lakkhiatsak hi
Mi pawlkhatte, khaici pawlkhat a tukna suang kitawphah leilak tawh kibang uh hi. Thu a zak phetun lungdam takin sang uh hi
Ahi zongin amaute sungah thuktumlo ahih manin sauveipi kiplo hi. Tua thu hangin lungkhamna ahi a, bawlsiatna ahi zongin a tun' ciangin a pukpah uh hi
Mi pawlkhatte, khaici pawlkhat a tukna mun lingbulsum a omna leilak tawh kibang uh hi. Hih bang mite in Pasian' thu a zak hangun
hih leitung lunghihmawhna, hauhnopna, leh deihna dang a tuamtuamte in a thu khuhcip ahih manin bangmah suakkhia zolo hi

Ahi zongin midangte ahih leh khaici pawlkhat a tukna mun leihoih tawh kibang uh hi. Amaute in Pasian' thu za-in sang uh a, pawlkhatte-a' dingin a zah sawmthum, pawlkhatte-a' dingin a zah sawmguk, pawlkhatte-a' dingin a zah za khatin man a nei hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Mi khatpeuh in mei a kivak hong la-in lawh peuh khuh a, ahih kei leh lupna nuai peuhah koih ngei ahi hiam? A kimuh theihna ding meivakna kho sang tungah koih hilo ahi hiam
Thusimin a kikoih peuhmah khatvei teitei thulang a suak ding, a kiseel peuhmah khatvei teitei a kipholak ding, cih deihna simloh bang dang om ahi hiam
Zakna ding bil a neite in hih thu za ta un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, “Na zak uh thu limtakin ngaihsun un. Midangte tungah na piakna uh tawh kizui-in note tungah Pasian in hong pia ding a, a tamzaw-in hong piathuah ding hi
A neisa mipa tungah Pasian in piathuah ding a, a neilo mipa tung panin themkhat a neihsun nangawn laksak ding hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Pasian' Ukna pen mi khat in a lolai-ah a vawh khaici tawh kibang hi
Khaici vawhpa zanin ihmu a, zingsangin tho-in sunin a nasep ngeiteng a sem hi. Tua kikal sungin a khaici na po-in na khang a, ahi zongin tua a khan'theihna zia amah in a thu theilo hi
Leitang in ama thu-in na khangsaktawm a, a masa-in a tehno, tua ciangin a kung, tua ciangin a tak a om dongin na khangsak hi
An a min ciangin anlak ding hun ahih manin amah in a phiaukawi tawh an at ding a kipan hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Pasian' Ukna bang tawh kibang ci ding a, i gentelna dingin bang thugentehna zang ding ihi hiam
Leitunga om khaici khempeuh lakah a neupenpen ankam tang tawh kibang hi. Mi khat in tua ankam tang lei-ah vawh a

tawlkhat khit ciangin hong po-in hong khangto a, khaikung khempeuh lakah a golpen pawl hong suak hi. A kung golin a hiangte zaii ahih manin ama liim sung a hiang kawmah vasate in bu a tom uh hi,” a ci hi.
Jesuh in hih bang thugentehnate zangin mite tungah thu hilh a, amaute' telzawh zah ciangciang thu a gen hi
Thugentehna lo tawh thu hilh ngeilo hi. A nungzuite guak tawh a omkhawm ciangin a thu khempeuh a gentel zel hi.
Tua ni mah a nitak ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah, “Tui kantanin galkhat lamah pai ni,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin a nungzuite in mihonpite nusia-in Jesuh a na tuan'nasa gunkuang tungah kahin a gunkuang tawh a paikhiatpih uh hi. Gunkuang dangte in zong amau a zui uh hi
Tua laitakin nakpi takin huihpi hong nung a, tuihual hong omin gunkuang sungah tui hong dim dektak hi
Jesuh pen gunkuang nunglamah lukham khamin ihmu-in a om hi. A nungzuite in amah phongin, “Sia aw, kote sita le ung phamawh hong salo na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Jesuh zong tho-in, “Nung nawn kei in,” ci-in huihpi thu pia a, tuihualte kiangah, “Kilok nawn kei un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin huihnung khawlin dai khipkhep pah hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah, “Bang hangin lau na hi uh hiam? Tu ciangdong upna nei nailo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi
A nungzuite in lamdangsa mahmah uh a, “Huihpi leh tuihualte nangawn, ama sawl bangin a gamta uh hi,” a ci uh hi.
